children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In addition to any funds otherwise available, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this chapter for fiscal years 2009 through 2013.

children.heading: International agreements
children.label: b International agreements
children.text: Funds authorized to be appropriated under this chapter may be used for the implementation of projects described in the Declaration on Embracing Technology and Cooperation to Promote the Secure and Efficient Flow of People and Commerce across our Shared Border between the United States and Mexico, agreed to , Monterrey, Mexico (commonly known as the Border Partnership Action Plan) or the Smart Border Declaration between the United States and Canada, agreed to , Ottawa, Canada that are consistent with the provisions of this chapter.March 22, 2002December 12, 2001
